summary: Admin Card Requests page improvements (Pagination, Search, Delete) - ALL FEATURES WORKING. 21/21 backend tests passed, all frontend UI tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: - Search matches user name, email (via bulk user lookup), card_type, and request_id
- Scope 'tab' filters by current status, 'all' searches across all statuses
- DELETE /api/v1/admin/card-requests/{request_id} handles FULFILLED requests by also deleting associated card
- Audit logs written to db.audit_logs with action='CARD_REQUEST_DELETE'
- Frontend debounces search (300ms), updates state smoothly on delete without page reload
seed_data_creation: No test data created - used existing 9 PENDING card requests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Card Requests feature complete with: 1) Pagination controls (20/50/100 page sizes, First/Prev/Next/Last buttons), 2) Global search (by name, email, card type, request ID), 3) Search scope (This tab / All tabs), 4) Delete with confirmation modal, 5) Audit logging for deletes.
features_verified: Invalid page size defaults to 50 - VERIFIED
Pagination response fields (total, page, page_size, total_pages, has_prev, has_next) - VERIFIED
Search by user name - VERIFIED (2 results for 'Gianni')
Search by email - VERIFIED (1 result for 'ashleyalt005')
Search by card type (VIRTUAL, DEBIT_PHYSICAL) - VERIFIED (6 results for DEBIT_PHYSICAL)
Search scope 'This tab' filters within current status - VERIFIED
Search scope 'All tabs' searches across all statuses - VERIFIED
Search results include user_name and user_email - VERIFIED
Delete button on each row - VERIFIED (9 delete buttons)
Delete confirmation modal shows correct info (User, Type, Status) - VERIFIED
Audit logging on delete (doesn't cause errors) - VERIFIED
